reason: irreconcilable conflict: tests assert exact strings (e.g., 'export function slugFromUrl(url: string)') which per behavior_in_task_description must be recoverable from instruction, but specifying exact function signatures constitutes solution_leakage per no_solution_leakage. Tests also verify behavior via text matching rather than actual execution (tests_verify_behavior_not_text, solution_uniqueness_guard), and solve.sh contains the gold patch inline (anti_cheating_measures). These are test problems, not instruction problems. Cannot fix without rewriting tests.
